name: Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the orange peel and set aside. Squeeze the orange to obtain about 1/2 cup of juice.
2. Cream the shortening in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy. Add eggs and mix well until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, and sugar. Stir in the grated orange peel.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, alternating with 1/2 cup of milk and 1/2 cup of orange juice. Mix thoroughly after each addition until a stiff batter forms.
5. Fold in the blueberries using a spatula or wooden spoon until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
6. Grease small muffin cups with butter or use paper liners if desired. Fill each cup about halfway full with the batter.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 20 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
Yield: Approximately 24 small muffins.
